ogTitle: Mareeba vs Maria Creeks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mareeba and Maria Creeks.
heading: Mareeba vs Maria Creeks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mareeba, Queensland and Maria Creeks, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mareeba has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Maria Creeks (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mareeba or Maria Creeks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mareeba has a flood risk score of 36/100, while Maria Creeks scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mareeba scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. Maria Creeks scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mareeba or Maria Creeks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mareeba has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
